title: Project Telos Twenty-First-Wave Social And Blog Outreach Claims

claims.text: The twenty-first-wave packet expands the active outreach queue only across YouTube, Reddit, and social/blog surfaces while keeping funding and new GitHub work out of scope.
claims.falsification: The packet prioritizes grant work, funding submissions, or new GitHub outreach as part of the active wave.

claims.text: The packet includes exact, non-identical comment drafts for 6 Reddit targets, 7 YouTube targets, and 8 social/blog targets with URLs and reasons.
claims.falsification: The packet lacks exact text, destinations, target reasons, or contains duplicated comments.

claims.text: The packet explicitly marks public posting as not completed and requires action-time confirmation before representational communication is posted.
claims.falsification: The packet claims comments were posted or authorizes public posting without exact destination and exact text confirmation.

claims.text: The packet limits link-bearing outreach to one self-promotion-thread comment and recommends an initial no-link first run.
claims.falsification: The packet recommends link-heavy posting, repeated link placement, or project-link comments outside a self-promotion context.

claims.text: The packet records the current browser limitation that Chrome was unavailable and no running browser window was found for authenticated posting.
claims.falsification: The packet omits the posting limitation or claims an authenticated posting path was available.
